title: neoalsomitra tonkinensis
intro: Neoalsomitra tonkinensis is a type of flowering plant in the family Capparaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Vietnam, to treat various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Neoalsomitra tonkinensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
